description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and large, rectangular windows dominating the facade. The front features a central wooden door flanked by two tall, rounded bushes and a stone pathway leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls are smooth and painted white, giving the house a clean, minimalist appearance. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some spanning both stories and others limited to a single floor. The interior is partially visible, revealing wooden floors, a staircase, and some furniture such as bookshelves and tables. The house sits on a small patch of green lawn, bordered by neatly trimmed landscaping.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large, asymmetrical windows, a flat roof, and a minimalist entryway flanked by bushes and a stone path.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large bushes, a stone path, and expansive windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical window arrangement and a glimpse of interior furnishings like bookshelves.
description_view_2: Rear view with more large windows and visible interior spaces, including a dining area and living room.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of window sizes and the continuation of the flat roof and white facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a stone path, flanked by two rounded bushes and no porch or overhang
